item.title: Epic Universe Wait Times in Review: May 2026
item.description:
Lines peak at 11 AM, then fall all day

The median standby wait climbs from about 15 minutes in the early hours to a 45-minute peak at 11 AM, holds through midday, then eases back to about 15 by close. From 11 AM to 3 PM the median runs 40 minutes, roughly double the 20-minute median after 7 PM. (Averages sit higher, peaking near 52 minutes, because a few long-wait headliners drag the mean up.)

item.title: Contact
item.description: Questions, bug reports, or feedback? Drop us a note and we’ll get back to you.

item.title: OtterRide Privacy Policy
item.description:
Infinite Jawbreaker LLC (“we,” “our,” or “us”) built OtterRide as a mobile application for viewing ride wait times at Universal Studios theme parks. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use OtterRide.

Disclaimer

OtterRide is an independent app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Universal Studios, NBCUniversal, or any of their subsidiaries or affiliates. All trademarks, service marks, and trade names are the property of their respective owners.
